data.body:
## Description

Validate the epic's success criteria by running both skills on real epics:

1. Run /roadmap with full scrutiny enabled and confirm output contains: gap analysis, scenario analysis, fidelity review verdict
2. Run /brainstorm on a real epic and confirm the output priority differs from default P2 (based on value/effort assessment)

This is a validation story — no code changes expected. If validation fails, create bug tickets.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Dogfooding validation complete (manual)
  Verify: echo 'Manual validation — see ticket comments for results'
